title: Add docstring to a pure function
prompt: Add a numpy-style docstring to the function below explaining args, returns, and one example. Do not change behavior.

title: Rename a local variable safely
prompt: Rename the local variable `tmp` to `aggregate` everywhere within the function, leaving callers untouched.

title: Replace deprecated datetime.utcnow with timezone-aware now
prompt: Replace any call to `datetime.utcnow()` with `datetime.now(timezone.utc)` and add the import. Do not change other behavior.
